creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Hello Aryeh,

I am not a C++ programmer, so can you file to libtorrent ticket[1]? Let me  
know the ticket id for I can follow up. Thanks.

[1] http://code.rasterbar.com/libtorrent/newticket

Cheers,
Mezz
